transcript.text: Are you doing all right? Yeah, yeah. Cool. I heard a voice. I don't know where that was from.
Yeah, I was making sure you're all right. I'm good. Because you got hurt by biking too much, right?
Yeah. So don't overdo it again. Right.
Oh, and you got to put the fluids there, okay? Yeah.
I'm sorry to be in here, Pat. Just making sure you're all right.
